mapper.select: SELECT g.id, c.id AS college_id, c.name AS college_name, g.major_id, m.name AS major_name, g.name, g.status, g.created_at, g.updated_at FROM class_groups g JOIN majors m ON g.major_id = m.id JOIN colleges c ON m.college_id = c.id WHERE g.id = #{id}

SELECT g.id, c.id AS college_id, c.name AS college_name, g.major_id, m.name AS major_name, g.name, g.status, g.created_at, g.updated_at FROM class_groups g JOIN majors m ON g.major_id = m.id JOIN colleges c ON m.college_id = c.id WHERE c.name = #{collegeName} AND m.name = #{majorName} AND c.status = 1 AND m.status = 1 AND g.status = 1 ORDER BY g.id ASC

SELECT g.id, c.id AS college_id, c.name AS college_name, g.major_id, m.name AS major_name, g.name, g.status, g.created_at, g.updated_at FROM class_groups g JOIN majors m ON g.major_id = m.id JOIN colleges c ON m.college_id = c.id ORDER BY c.id ASC, m.id ASC, g.status DESC, g.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO class_groups (major_id, name, status) VALUES (#{majorId}, #{name}, #{status})
